_about: Frozen baseline numbers for binGenerator.bench.ts. Captured before the wall-pattern optimizations in this PR landed; used to gauge how much each optimization moves the needle. Re-capture by running `CI=true pnpm exec vitest bench binGenerator --run` and copying the unit-env means into this file (with the new commit + timestamp).

scenarios.name: dense_wide_with_cutouts (cold)
scenarios.params: 6×4u, height 6u, 12×8 compartments (96), wall pattern honeycomb, 4 wall cutouts (70%×50%)

scenarios.name: tall_with_cutouts (cold)
scenarios.params: 4×4u, height 6u, 6×6 compartments (36), wall pattern honeycomb, 4 wall cutouts (70%×50%)

scenarios.name: cache_warm_cutout_iter
scenarios.params: dense_wide_with_cutouts + 4 cutout-width nudges (5 generations total per iteration)

scenarios.name: first build (cold): 4×2×6 honeycomb + cutouts
scenarios.params: 4×2u, height 6u, honeycomb wall pattern, 4 wall cutouts (70%×50%)

scenarios.name: cutout-width nudge (warm): base compound should hit cache
scenarios.params: 4×2×6 honeycomb + cutouts, two generations per iteration with cutout width changed
